title: review-issue-at-pi-level
description: Schema for the Review — Issue at PI Level widget. Two narratable sections: (1) top PI issue concentration across current and previous 3 schedules, and (2) sub-audit zero-tolerance + high-risk issue concentration.

totalIssues.description: Total issues linked to this PI across all schedules analyzed

percentOfTotal.description: This PI's issues as a percentage of grand total issues; rounded to 1 decimal

ztIssues.description: Count of Zero Tolerance risk issues in this sub-audit across all schedules

highIssues.description: Count of High risk issues in this sub-audit across all schedules

ztAndHighIssues.description: Combined ZT + High risk issue count (pre-computed: ztIssues + highIssues)

ztAndHighPercent.description: ZT + High issues as a percentage of this sub-audit's totalIssues; rounded to 1 decimal

totalIssues.description: Total issues in this sub-audit across all schedules (all risk levels)

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this payload was generated

scheduleCount.description: Number of schedules analyzed (current + up to previous 3)

totalIssues.description: Grand total issues across all schedules in scope

totalUniquePIs.description: Number of unique PIs that have at least one issue across all schedules

piConcentration.description: Top PI Issue Concentration: top 5 PIs pre-ranked descending by total issues across all schedules

top5ConcentrationPercent.description: Percentage of grand total issues contributed by the top 5 PIs; rounded to 1 decimal

topPIs.description: Top 5 PIs sorted descending by totalIssues. May have fewer items if fewer than 5 PIs exist.

subAuditRiskConcentration.description: Sub-Audit Risk Concentration: top 3 sub-audits ranked descending by combined ZT + High risk issue count

topSubAudits.description: Top 3 sub-audits sorted descending by ztAndHighIssues. May have fewer items if fewer than 3 sub-audits exist.
